creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested a little bit...

I have 3 different poudriere-jail-types. One of them is showing the issue. The other 2 are just building fine. The one which fails, is sort of cross-compiling. Same architecture, but different CPU arch. While the 2 OK types are building with "-march=native -fvectorize" (10 or more years old Intel Xeon), the failing one is building with "-march=amdfam10 -mno-prfchw -mno-sse4a -mno-lzcnt -fvectorize"

The failure is for checking the size of wchar_t, it can't compute the sizeof(wchar_t).

There are also some small differences in OPTIONS_(UN)SET (the OK types have OPENMP set and LTO unset, whereas the failing one has LTO set and OPENMP not listed at all). The rest is the same options set/unset.

Only in the jail type for amdfam10 PIE_UNSAFE is needed. As such I'm surely in the "esoteric circumstances" situation and wouldn't mind if you close this report.

The complete diff between two types of jails ("bastille" beeing the one which fails):
--- poudriere-nox11-make.conf        2023-01-25 12:55:52.762451000 +0100
+++ poudriere-bastille-make.conf        2023-02-06 10:21:16.938932000 +0100
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 COPTFLAGS= -O2 -pipe
-.  if !${.CURDIR:M/usr/src/sys/boot*}
-CPUTYPE?=native
+.  if !${.CURDIR:M/usr/src/sys/boot*} && !${.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/lang/gcc*}
+CPUTYPE?=amdfam10
 .  endif
-.  if ${.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/lang/gcc*}
+.  if ${.CURDIR:M/usr/src/*} || ${.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/lang/gcc*} || ${.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/devel/mimalloc}
 CFLAGS+= -O2 -pipe
 .  else
-CFLAGS+= -O2 -pipe -mtune=native -fvectorize # -mfpmath=sse -msse2
+CFLAGS+= -O2 -pipe -mno-prfchw -mno-sse4a -mno-lzcnt -fvectorize #-mfpmath=sse -msse2
 .  endif
 
 MASTER_SITE_BACKUP?=    \
@@ -25,9 +25,9 @@
 
 WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes
 
-OPTIONS_SET= CUPS GNUPG ICONV MMX OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS SEM SIMD HTTP2 OPENMP
-OPTIONS_UNSET= AALIB ALSA ARTS ESOUND ESPEAK IDN KDE3 NAS NOUVEAU PORTAUDIO PROFILE PULSEAUDIO X11 OPENGL V4L VAAPI VDPAU XVIDEO LTO PROFILE
-DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5+ java=11+ pgsql=15 mysql=8.0 #python=3.11 python3=3.11
+OPTIONS_SET= CUPS GNUPG ICONV MMX OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS SEM SIMD HTTP2 LTO
+OPTIONS_UNSET= AALIB ALSA ARTS ESOUND IDN KDE3 NAS NOUVEAU PORTAUDIO PROFILE PULSEAUDIO X11 OPENGL V4L VAAPI VDPAU XVIDEO PROFILE
+DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5+ php=81 mysql=8.0 #python=3.11 pyrhon3=3.11
 LICENSES_ACCEPTED=PDFlib
 
 WITH_PKGNG=YES
